paragraphs.text: Submit STCW credentials, medical fitness records, and endorsements for licensed seafarers. All fields marked with * are required by Section 14(b) of the Maritime Code.
An accredited flag-state authority issuing vessel registrations, STCW endorsements, voyage clearances, and statutory compliance certificates for commercial operators worldwide.
Statutory Office · Quay 14, Port Authority Complex · ZIP 02144

visibleText: IM Ironclad Maritime Registry Directorate of Shipping & Seafarer Affairs Vessel Registration Crew Certification Voyage Manifest Compliance Audit Fee Schedule Home  /  Seafarer Services  / Crew Certification Crew Certification Application Submit STCW credentials, medical fitness records, and endorsements for licensed seafarers. All fields marked with * are required by Section 14(b) of the Maritime Code. § 1 — Seafarer Details 5 / 16 fields Full Legal Name * Date of Birth * Nationality * Seafarer ID No. * Rank / Position * § 2 — Certificate Information 6 / 16 fields STCW Certificate No. * Issue Date * Expiry Date * Issuing Authority * Endorsement Type * Original Renewal Duplicate Additional Endorsements GMDSS Radio Operator Endorsement (Reg.
